divisions.title: Birth Narratives
divisions.theme: The birth of John and Jesus
divisions.summary: Annunciations to Zechariah and Mary, births of John the Baptist and Jesus, presentation in the temple

divisions.title: Preparation and Galilean Ministry
divisions.summary: Baptism, genealogy, temptation, rejection at Nazareth, calling disciples, teaching, and miracles throughout Galilee

divisions.title: Journey to Jerusalem
divisions.summary: Jesus sets his face toward Jerusalem and teaches through parables and encounters along the way

divisions.title: Jerusalem Ministry
divisions.summary: Jesus teaches in the temple, debates with religious leaders, and gives the Olivet discourse

divisions.title: Passion
divisions.summary: The Last Supper, arrest, trials before the Sanhedrin and Pilate, and crucifixion

divisions.title: Resurrection and Ascension
divisions.summary: Empty tomb, road to Emmaus, appearances to disciples, and ascension

chapterSummaries.1: Announcement of John's and Jesus' births to Zechariah and Mary
chapterSummaries.2: Birth of Jesus, shepherds, presentation in the temple, and boy Jesus in the temple
chapterSummaries.3: John the Baptist prepares the way, Jesus is baptized, genealogy of Jesus
chapterSummaries.4: Jesus is tempted, rejected at Nazareth, and begins healing ministry
chapterSummaries.5: Calling of the first disciples, healing a leper and paralytic
chapterSummaries.6: Lord of the Sabbath, choosing the twelve, Sermon on the Plain
chapterSummaries.7: Healing the centurion's servant, raising widow's son, John's question
chapterSummaries.8: Parable of the sower, calming the storm, healing demon-possessed man
chapterSummaries.9: Sending out the twelve, feeding five thousand, Peter's confession, transfiguration
chapterSummaries.10: Sending the seventy-two, parable of the Good Samaritan, Mary and Martha
chapterSummaries.11: Teaching on prayer, Beelzebul accusation, sign of Jonah, woes to Pharisees
chapterSummaries.12: Warnings and parables about greed, worry, watchfulness, and division
chapterSummaries.13: Repent or perish, healing on Sabbath, parables of mustard seed and yeast
chapterSummaries.14: Healing on Sabbath, parables of the banquet and cost of discipleship
chapterSummaries.15: Parables of the lost sheep, lost coin, and prodigal son
chapterSummaries.16: Parable of the shrewd manager, teachings on wealth and divorce
chapterSummaries.17: Teaching on sin, faith, duty, healing ten lepers, coming of the kingdom
chapterSummaries.18: Parables of persistent widow and Pharisee, blessing children, rich ruler
chapterSummaries.19: Zacchaeus, parable of the ten minas, triumphal entry, cleansing temple
chapterSummaries.20: Authority questioned, parable of tenants, questions about taxes and resurrection
chapterSummaries.21: Widow's offering, signs of the end times, destruction of Jerusalem
chapterSummaries.22: Conspiracy, Last Supper, Gethsemane, arrest, Peter's denial, trial
chapterSummaries.23: Trial before Pilate and Herod, crucifixion, death, and burial
chapterSummaries.24: Resurrection, road to Emmaus, appearances to disciples, ascension
